cvText: Julia Sawicka — React Frontend Developer Summary Experienced react frontend developer with 4 years in marketplace. Most recently at Booksy, leading initiatives for a team of 5 building salon booking dashboard using React, TypeScript, Redux, Jest, Webpack. Experience Booksy | React Frontend Developer | 2020–Present - Delivered salon booking dashboard with React, TypeScript, Redux, Jest, Webpack. - Collaborated with a team of 5 to ship features used by thousands of users. - Improved reliability, performance, and developer experience across services. - Introduced automation, monitoring, and quality gates in CI/CD. - Worked with facts embedded in CV: React, Booksy, TypeScript, team of 5, Redux, Jest, Webpack. Earlier roles Built internal platforms, integrated third-party APIs, and supported production systems in marketplace companies. Led migrations, refactors, and on-call rotations while maintaining high service levels. Education MSc Computer Science, Warsaw University of Technology Additional notes Throughout my career I have partnered closely with product managers, designers, and stakeholders to deliver reliable software in fast-moving environments. I value clear communication, pragmatic architecture decisions, and measurable outcomes. I regularly mentor junior engineers, facilitate code reviews, and contribute to engineering guidelines. I am comfortable working in cross-functional squads, participating in incident response, and translating business goals into technical roadmaps. I have experience with agile ceremonies, backlog refinement, and production support. I focus on observability, automated testing, and incremental delivery. I enjoy learning new tools when they solve real problems and I document decisions so teams can maintain systems confidently after launch. In previous roles I improved deployment frequency, reduced defect rates, and helped teams adopt better engineering practices. I am motivated by ownership, craftsmanship, and building products that users trust every day. jobOffer: We are hiring a React Frontend Developer to join our marketplace product team. You will work on salon booking dashboard and collaborate with engineers using React, TypeScript, Redux, Jest, Webpack. We expect hands-on experience with React, Booksy, and modern delivery practices. You will partner with a team of 5 squads, participate in architecture discussions, and improve reliability of customer-facing services. Bonus if you have led migrations, mentored teammates, or contributed to platform standards. We offer hybrid work, competitive compensation, and opportunities to grow into technical leadership while staying close to code.
